ksa_text: Knowledge of data product design principles, including data product definition, consumer segmentation, interface design (APIs, subscriptions, files), Service Level Agreement (SLA) definition, and data product lifecycle management.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of functionality, quality, and security requirements and how these will apply to specific items of supply (i.e., elements and processes).

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Knowledge of functionality, quality, and security requirements and how these will apply to specific items of supply (i.e., elements and processes).
Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-K-020 (Data Quality) scores 0.426 composite (signal: weak). Scope fit for Cloud Data Architect: edge_case. Preliminary decision: include.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: Score 0.426 is below 0.43 threshold for edge-case inclusion in Cloud Data Architect.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: Overturned to exclude. Score 0.426 insufficient for edge-case inclusion (min 0.43). Decision: exclude.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Data Quality KSA DQ-K-020 as a discrete competency for Cloud Data Architect?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA excluded at Pass 2 (scope: edge_case) or Pass 3. No market evidence warrants reversal for Cloud Data Architect.

decision_rationale: Edge-case scope with score 0.426 below minimum threshold. Overturned at Pass 3.
